components-verified-checkboxes-overview-.name: Overview
components-verified-checkboxes-overview-.title: Components (Verified)/Checkboxes/Overview
components-verified-checkboxes-overview-.content:
{/* NOTE: Do NOT use auto-formatting on this MDX's. Otherwise MDX creates extra

elements per line */} import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks'; import { List, Link, ListLink, Heading, Paragraph } from '~/src/index'; {/* Workaround: This div is so that Storybook styling DOESN'T overwrite CFPB styling */} Checkboxes Use checkboxes when the user can select more than one option from a list. Make clear with helper text that this is the case. Use [radio buttons](https://cfpb.github.io/design-system/components/radio-buttons) when the user can choose only one option from a list. Source: https://cfpb.github.io/design-system/components/checkboxes

Types

components-verified-text-inputs-overview.name: Overview
components-verified-text-inputs-overview.title: Components (Verified)/Text inputs/Overview
components-verified-text-inputs-overview.content:
import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks'; import { List, Link, ListLink, Heading, Paragraph } from '~/src/index'; Text inputs Text inputs allow the user to enter any combination of letters, numbers, or symbols. Text input fields can span single or multiple lines. Source: https://cfpb.github.io/design-system/components/text-inputs
Types

components-draft-selects-overview--overv.name: Overview
components-draft-selects-overview--overv.title: Components (Draft)/Selects/Overview
components-draft-selects-overview--overv.content:
import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks'; import { Heading, Link, List, ListLink, Paragraph } from '~/src/index'; Selects Selects allow users to make a single selection or multiple selections from a finite list of options. They are not always the best choice from a usability perspective; see the use cases documentation for more details. Source: https://cfpb.github.io/design-system/components/selects
Types
